masked_case_json.world_change: an ai-cybersecurity company has an appealing autonomous-defense narrative and still reports double-digit revenue and recurring-revenue growth. but the same update contains a demand warning: guidance is weak relative to expectations and management actions point to budget pressure or competitive friction.
